title: もっといいモンを作りやがれ

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... I got my hopes up for this new DAW after
seeing all the good reviews, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The effects are—hell, everything is way below average. I can't believe they'd just slap together a product, thinkin' it'd be fine as long as it can mix.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I have serious doubts about the sanity of anyone
who called this the best of the best.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
A few tweaks to the equalizer would've improved
its output drastically. Maybe I should try coding a
plugin myself...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur loses track of time focusing on
fine-tuning her music software, and ends up
missing training.
